name: Sugar Free
overview: Liton and Nannu are two failed snatchers. Their dream is to one day become the infamous snatcher of the country. But both are very humane. Due to this, while going for snatching, one has to be a victim of unwanted situation at different times.

trailers.title: কপাল এতই খারাপ, এরা যেদিকে চায়, সাগর শুকিয়ে যায় | Sugarfree | Free Mini Series | Chorki
